title: Consistent Splash Potions
description: Makes it easier to get the most out of splash potions.
body:
# Consistent Splash Potions Makes it easier to get the maximum duration, health or damage out of splash potions. `/consistentpots accuracyPercentage ` changes extra added accuracy for each splash (higher percentages increase the chances of getting more out of a potion, 50 by default). `/consistentpots accuracyPercentage` to see the current percentage.

##
